artwork_policy: GPT Image originals; code is limited to chroma cleanup, cropping, nearest-neighbor normalization, palette reduction and manifest creation.

sources.prompt_summary: Common visual identity board for characters, livestock, buildings, props and items
Straw-hat farmer four-direction three-frame walk cycle
Player hoe, watering, mining, fishing cast and fishing reel actions
Five NPC dialogue portraits with neutral, happy and concerned expressions
Chicken and cow state animation pack
Six crops across five growth stages
Harvest, ranch, forage, ore and fish icon pack
Tools, soil states and ambient effect pack
Market, village, ranch, coast, mine and landmark prop pack
Chunky right-angle farming hoe for 32px toolbelt readability

maps.source_policy: GPT Image repaint referenced from a GPT tile-and-prop blueprint; code only crops and nearest-neighbor normalizes
